overview: A professional website for gSoft, Inc. featuring warm golden tones, animated tech wave backgrounds, 6 service pages, portfolio showcase, and a simple admin panel for content management.
features: Warm golden/amber light background design with dark contrasting fonts
Animated parabolic waves with tech names (Java, .NET, SAP, AI) as background
6 service pages: E-Business, Web Dev, Mobile, Offshore, Managed Hosting, IT Staffing
Contact page with two office locations
Password-protected admin panel for content management
